description: Adaptive skill reading configuration - balances token usage with spec compliance

strategy.comment: 5 minutes in seconds - skill reads within this window are skipped

critical.comment: Always force skill read - bugs here are expensive
critical.reason: High bug cost: security, data integrity, API contracts

highRisk.reason: Moderate bug cost: business logic, state management

lowRisk.reason: Low bug cost: types, tests, documentation

small.reason: Typos, small tweaks - not worth 2K tokens

medium.reason: Apply time window - may be iterative changes

large.reason: Large changes - high complexity, force read
